chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 498 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 22.09.2025 Mr. Dhanraj, Advocate along with applicant. Complainant is present in person. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant requires the bail application to be disposed of as not pressed. Ordered accordingly. Bail application stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
